reference: I took a Plan B pill today right after my partner and I had sex. Unfortunately, two hours later after taking the pill, one thing led to another, and we had unprotected sex again. Does that mean I can be pregnant, or does the pill already cover it too? Should I take another Plan B pill?
text: I took a Plan B pill today right after my partner and I had sex. Unfortunately, two hours later after taking the pill, one thing led to another, and we had unprotected sex again. Bizet and I can be pregnant? He'll already cover it too. Should I take another Plan B pill?
